channel.title: briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Trumpiest Trump We’ve Ever Beheld
item.description: The president is becoming the very thing that destroyed the Democrats: a reality-denying machine.

item.title: Tariffs cost American shoppers. They're unlikely to get that money back
item.description: After the Supreme Court declared the emergency tariffs illegal, the refund process will be messy and will go to businesses first.

item.title: Pentagon shifts toward maintaining ties to Scouting
item.description: Months after NPR reported on the Pentagon's efforts to sever ties with Scouting America, efforts to maintain the partnership have new momentum

item.title: Russia Launches Big Strikes Before U.S.-Ukraine Talks in Geneva
item.description: Moscow unleashed an extensive drone and missile attack just hours before American officials were set to meet with Kyiv’s chief negotiator.

item.title: Child Care Giant Let Some Staff Work Without Full Vetting, Records Show
item.description: Inspectors found several instances in which staff members at Bright Horizons were working in classrooms even though they had not completed all of the ...

item.title: New A.C.A. Plans Could Increase Family Deductibles to $31,000
item.description: The Trump administration is proposing Obamacare plans that it says will lower health insurance premiums. But critics warn they would make care unaffor...

item.title: What We Know About the Gun Battle Off the Coast of Cuba
item.description: Four armed Cubans aboard a Florida-based speedboat died in a gunfight with Cuban border troops on Wednesday, officials said.

item.title: U.S. and Iran to hold nuclear talks. And, Harvard professor resigns over Epstein ties
item.description: U.S. and Iranian officials are set to meet today in Geneva to discuss Tehran's nuclear program. And, Harvard professor Larry Summers is resigning over...

item.title: Why farmers in California are backing a giant solar farm
item.description: Many farmers have had to fallow land as a state law comes into effect limiting their access to water. There's now a push to develop some of that land ...

item.title: Every business wants your review. What's with the feedback frenzy?
item.description: Customers want to read reviews and businesses need reviews to attract customers. But the constant demand for reviews could be creating a feedback back...

item.title: Marco Rubio Says U.S. Is Probing Deadly Cuban Shooting
item.description: Cuban officials said border troops engaged in gunfire with a Florida-based speedboat on Wednesday, leaving four dead on the boat and six wounded. Secr...

item.title: A Deal or War? Crucial Talks Begin Between U.S. and Iran.
item.description: President Trump has kept up a steady drumbeat of threats and built up U.S. troops in the region. Iran’s task is to give him a win but also preserve so...

item.title: Russia Launches Big Strikes Before U.S.-Ukraine Talks in Geneva
item.description: Moscow unleashed an extensive drone and missile attack just hours before American officials were set to meet with Kyiv’s chief negotiator.

item.title: What We Know About the Gun Battle Off the Coast of Cuba
item.description: Four armed Cubans aboard a Florida-based speedboat died in a gunfight with Cuban border troops on Wednesday, officials said.

item.title: A Last Chance Before War
item.description: The U.S. and Iran both say they want to avoid a conflict. Time is running out to avoid one.
